raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the conceptual issue of inconsistency between the claimed physics-informed framing and the actual training procedure, proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (DeepONet) and articulates the delta in terms of problem setting and architecture.",
    "RX.1": "Does not mark uncertainty for all claims, but flags several clearly out-of-reach claims such as the 'spectral' name justification and the DeepONet comparison.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift: the ablation discussion is outside the requested scope of the introduction/methods section.",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the inference about physical priors contradicts the stated conclusion.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.6,
    "RX.4": 0.5,
    "RX.5": 0.2
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the conceptual issue of inconsistency between the claimed physics-informed framing and the actual training procedure, proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (DeepONet) and articulates the delta in terms of problem setting and architecture.
rationale.RX.1: Does not mark uncertainty for all claims, but flags several clearly out-of-reach claims such as the 'spectral' name justification and the DeepONet comparison.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift: the ablation discussion is outside the requested scope of the introduction/methods section.
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression: the inference about physical priors contradicts the stated conclusion.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
